final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover-design
Asset type: Xiaohongshu (小红书) style vertical cover image, 9-grid layout (九宫格), single-tile portrait crop
Primary request: design a Xiaohongshu amateur/素人 influencer-style book/post cover featuring DJI Pocket 4 as the hero product, with cute differentiated title typography
Scene/backdrop: bright, clean lifestyle backdrop typical of 小红书 素人 aesthetic — soft pastel tones, minimal clutter, slightly warm ambient light
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera prominently displayed at center-foreground; overall composition styled as a 素人 (everyday amateur creator) Xiaohongshu post cover
Style/medium: flat digital illustration mixed with photo-collage aesthetic, 小红书 素人 style — soft, approachable, youthful, slightly handcrafted feel
Composition/framing: vertical portrait (2:3), nine-grid (九宫格) single-panel layout, DJI Pocket 4 centered in lower-middle zone, title text occupying upper-center area
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, warm and cheerful, approachable and casual mood
Color palette: pastel pink, cream white, warm beige, light mint accents — typical 小红书 素人 palette
Materials/textures: smooth matte background with subtle paper or linen texture, soft drop shadow under product
Text (verbatim): "大疆pocket4初体验"
Typography: cute, playful, differentiated font style — mix of rounded bubble letterforms and hand-lettering feel; title text large and bold at center-top; Chinese characters styled with kawaii/cute personality
Constraints: DJI Pocket 4 must be clearly recognizable; text "大疆pocket4初体验" must appear verbatim and be the dominant headline; layout must feel like an authentic 小红书 素人 cover
Avoid: overly polished commercial ad look, dark or moody lighting, serif formal fonts, cluttered background
